title: Mobile app version is changed
scenario: Verify that the upgraded mobile app version is correctly displayed on the Device user, Inventory, Mobile profile, and Device profile pages after a mobile user upgrades their app on a headset registered to a Lens tenant.
steps: 1. Ensure the mobile user's headset is registered to a Lens tenant.
2. Upgrade the mobile app on the user's device to the latest version.
3. Navigate to the Device user / Mobile user page and verify the new mobile app version is displayed correctly.
4. Navigate to the Inventory page and verify the new mobile app version is displayed correctly.
5. Navigate to the Mobile profile page and verify the new mobile app version is displayed correctly.
6. Navigate to the Device profile page and verify the new mobile app version is displayed correctly.
expected: The new mobile app version is correctly displayed on the Device user/mobile user page, Inventory page, Mobile profile page, and Device profile page.
